name: temporal
description: Demodatabase for temporal types in Trino

attributes.name: time_from_integer
attributes.label: Time from integer
attributes.description: Time of day encoded as HHMMSS integer

attributes.name: time_from_string
attributes.label: Time from string
attributes.description: Time of day encoded as HH:MM:SS string

attributes.name: time_from_timestamp
attributes.label: Time from timestamp
attributes.description: Time of day carried in a timestamp

attributes.name: uuid_string
attributes.label: UUID from string
attributes.description: UUID encoded as a CHAR(36) string

attributes.name: timestamp_zoned
attributes.label: Timestamp instant
attributes.description: Zone-aware instant normalized to the model zone

attributes.name: timestamp_unix_epoche
attributes.label: Timestamp Unix epoch (seconds)
attributes.description: Instant encoded as seconds since the epoch

attributes.name: timestamp_java_epoche
attributes.label: Timestamp Java epoch (milliseconds)
attributes.description: Instant encoded as milliseconds since the epoch

attributes.name: ts_diff_intraday
attributes.label: Elapsed-span end (< 1 day)
attributes.description: Anchor plus a fixed sub-day span

attributes.name: ts_diff_multiday
attributes.label: Elapsed-span end (> 1 day)
attributes.description: Anchor plus a fixed span over 24 hours

attributes.name: money_scaled
attributes.label: Decimal from scaled integer
attributes.description: Fixed-point decimal stored as minor units

links.name: same_check
links.comment: both tables refer to the same data record
